step_summary.error.submit_failed: Submitting your application failed. Please try again.
step_summary.label.name: Name
step_summary.start_date_description: When would you like to start your work at gingr.ch?
step_summary.salary_calc.title: How your salary is calculated
step_summary.salary_calc.step1_text: Your income is divided by the standardized hourly rate of CHF 200. The result is your working hours.
step_summary.salary_calc.step2_text: Additional services are legally recorded as a ‘bonus’ and added to your working hours.
step_summary.salary_calc.step3_text: Expenses are billed separately and are not included in salary calculation.
step_summary.salary_calc.step4_text: Legal social insurance contributions, the monthly QUITT fee of CHF 50, and the Gingr service fee are deducted from the gross salary.
step_summary.salary_calc.accordion_text: The standardized hourly rate of CHF 200 is used to convert the income you generate on gingr.ch into working hours. This enables legally compliant payroll, regardless of your individual pricing models on the platform.
step_summary.net_salary.title: Your net salary is made up of:
step_summary.consent_text: I have carefully reviewed all information and agree with the calculation method shown as well as the terms of the employment relationship.
